name: Inception Labs Mercury
description: Registers Inception Labs Mercury as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider using INCEPTION_API_KEY.

env.description: Fallback Inception API key used for Mercury inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

providers.name: Mercury
